content.speakerText: Alright, I’ve got everything I need—thanks again for clearing this up!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我需要的信息都有了，再次感谢你帮我理清思路！
expectedAnswers: You’re welcome! Good luck with your application!
No problem at all—I’m happy to help. Wishing you the best!
Anytime! Let me know if you need anything else before you submit.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应感谢并表达祝福或支持
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'welcome', 'good luck', 'appreciate', 'help' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’ll send you that syllabus by Friday and start drafting my letter of intent this weekend.
content.speakerTextCn: 我周五发你大纲，这周末就开始写转专业意向信。
expectedAnswers: That’s great! I’ll keep an eye out for it. Feel free to reach out if you want feedback!
Perfect! Let me know how it goes—I’m here if you need a second pair of eyes.
Cool, thanks for the update! Don’t hesitate to ask if anything’s unclear.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的行动承诺并主动提供后续支持
语言准确性：正确使用将来时、条件句和礼貌请求表达
表达自然度：语气友好、非机械，符合真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了 'perfect', 'look out for', 'reach out', 'feedback', 'let me know' 等场景高频表达

content.speakerText: I really appreciate all the advice you’ve given me today.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢你今天给我的所有建议。
expectedAnswers: I’m so glad I could help! You’re doing an amazing job.
You’re very welcome—keep up the great work!
Thank you for saying that! If you need more help later, just send me a message.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否得体回应感谢并传递积极情感
语言准确性：语法结构完整，无拼写或搭配错误
表达自然度：避免机械套用，有个性化和情感温度
关键词覆盖：使用了 'welcome', 'glad', 'help', 'appreciate', 'keep up the good work' 等核心表达
